subcodes.first_line: O servant of the threshold of the Most Great Lord! Though I have no time whatsoever, nor respite to pen a letter, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حضرت کبریا هر چند ابدا فرصت ندارم و مهلت نیست که نامه نگارم ولی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @prayer for governments and rulers, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @service to others; to the Cause of God
